title: filago recta
intro: Filago recta, also known as basket grass or fleabane, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its small white or pink flowers and feathery leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat a range of health issues. The medicinal properties of Filago recta include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Filago recta can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
